metadata.title: [REVIEW] Sensitive Authentication Data Logged to Console

output.summary: Task execution completed with exit code 0
output.implementationNotes:
Task execution completed. Check logs for details.

Final output:
Removed console debug logging that could expose authentication context or API key fragments in runtime output, keeping the feature behavior unchanged while eliminating sensitive output. In `src/components/financial/FinancialSyncPanel.jsx` the auth/user debug logging effect is removed, and in `src/services/mailjetService.js` the Mailjet key prefix logging is removed.

Build: `npm run build` (succeeded; Vite warned about missing `createProposalDeliverables`/`createProposalConcepts` exports in `src/services/proposalService.js`).

If you want, I can also hunt for other debug-only logs that might reveal sensitive data.
